name: Matter Possessed
tips: A 25🗡️/25🤍 body for 1 mana is the cheapest big threat in the game — the real price is the 25🤍 it deals to your own face.
Play it early while your life total is high. From a full 100🤍 you land at 75🤍 — still comfortable, but have a plan to protect your face afterwards.
Melee only — it must be orthogonally adjacent to attack, so it wants to march up its lane.
It's a Dark Mage (element Dark, tribe Mage): a cheap extra body that counts toward every per-Dark-Mage pool gain and receives Dark Matter Stash's buff.
rulings: Cost: Deal 25🤍 to own face is paid the moment the card is played, on top of the 1 mana. You must have at least 25🤍 to play it.
Playing Matter Possessed at exactly 25🤍 is legal — it reduces you to 0🤍, and 0🤍 = defeat. The minion still lands, but you immediately lose the game.
The 25🤍 hits your life total, not a minion, and cannot be redirected or reduced.
It is a [[Dark Mage]] (element Dark, tribe exactly Mage) — it counts toward per-Dark-Mage Dark Matter gains and receives Dark-Mage-targeted buffs while on board.
